calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Dustin Burt Ii And Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134
Off Calendar Apr-06-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. SANPREET GILL, Esq. (Tel: 800-449-6311) for petitioner;
Also present: DUSTIN BURT II.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER IN-TREPID709, LLC's Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Dustin Burt II And Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134.

Matter discussed.

The Court rules as follows: Petitioner's petition is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
